events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: unprotected trench ≥5 ft with workers in it, actively in progress. This is a critical safety violation under OSHA 1926 Subpart P. Trenches 5 ft or deeper require protective systems (sloping, shoring, shielding). Workers in an unprotected trench is an immediate life-threatening hazard (cave-in).

Decision: fail
Risk: critical
Work stage: in-progress
Component conditions: non-compliant
Percent complete: estimate maybe 30-50%? The trench is open and workers are in it, so excavation work is in progress. I'll estimate 40%.
Findings: unprotected trench ≥5 ft with workers inside, no cave-in protection
Actions: stop work, evacuate workers, install protective system (trench box/shoring/sloping) per engineered design, inspect by competent person
References: OSHA 1926 Subpart P (1926.652)

  ]
